---
paths: ["adventures/**/*.md"]
---

# Adventure conventions

An Adventure is a story arc the party runs inside this campaign. Each adventure lives in `adventures/<slug>/` with an `adventure.md` carrying frontmatter for `status` (`introduced | active | completed | abandoned`), `order` (ingest-era only), `introduced`, `started`, `completed` dates.

`/wrap-session` proposes status transitions; the GM approves them as part of the wrap review.
